title: Computer Basics
description: Understand how computers work, operating systems, and basic command line navigation.

title: Programming Basics
description: Learn the fundamentals of programming: variables, loops, logic, and data structures.

title: Python
description: Deep dive into Python, the lingua franca of Data Science. Object-oriented programming, virtual environments, and key libraries.

title: Git & GitHub
description: Version control is essential. Learn how to track changes, collaborate, and manage repositories.

title: Mathematics
description: The foundation of algorithms. Linear Algebra and Calculus essentials.

title: Statistics & Probability
description: Distributions, Hypothesis Testing, and A/B Testing.

title: SQL & Databases
description: Relational databases, joins, window functions, and NoSQL basics.

title: Machine Learning
description: Scikit-Learn, Regression, Classification, and Clustering algorithms.
